caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 21 kt winds with a less than 10% rain probability not applicable, instead it has an 86% rain probability and 5.2 ft wave heights from a SE direction. Turks & Caicos is seeing similar conditions with 22 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, however specific probability is not provided for this location.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing 70% rain probability with winds reaching 15 kt and wave heights of 5.5 ft, while Istanbul has a less intense weather system with winds of 13 kt. I expect Haifa to be the most impacted port in the Mediterranean today, with the dominant swell direction coming from the WNW at a swell period of 6 s.
